title: rubus mananensis
intro: Rubus mananensis, also known as the Indian raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus mananensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Rubus mananensis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into salves and creams for topical application.
